Home.valueDescription: A production-ready frontend for professional purchasing with real-time availability, clear product data, and a smooth checkout journey.
Home.valueCardOperationsDescription: Manage categories, featured products, and editorial pages from the backoffice without sacrificing customer experience.
Home.valueCardAvailabilityDescription: Show accurate stock levels, transparent pricing, and actionable product information to speed up buying decisions.
Home.valueCardSupportDescription: Deliver responsive support before and after purchase with effective search and a consistently synced cart.
